summary: Frontend testing of /minted-photos Card View flip functionality. All 9 requested features verified working. Key fixes confirmed: no frantic rotation on backdrop click, reduced card gap (gap-3), nav bar hides/shows correctly with flip state.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All card flip features verified working. Flip button flips card in place, flip-back button returns to front, backdrop click also unflips card smoothly without frantic rotation. Nav bar hides when card is flipped and returns when unflipped. Cards have reduced gap (gap-3). Grid View button is hidden.

card_flip_works.details: Clicking 'Tap to flip' shows back view with Base Value, XP bar, Total Dollar Value, Authenticity, Photo Stats & Bonuses

backdrop_dismisses_flip_smoothly.details: CRITICAL: Clicking backdrop (outside flipped card) dismisses flip smoothly - NO frantic rotation observed

reduced_card_gap.details: Cards have gap-3 (reduced from gap-6/8). Grid classes: 'grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-3 md:grid-cols-4 gap-3 p-2'

card_layout_order.details: Card layout: Photo -> Name -> Dollar Value & Stars -> Scenery & Level -> Stamina -> Tap to flip

grid_view_hidden.details: Grid View and List View buttons are hidden. Only Card View button (LayoutGrid icon) is visible

nav_bar_hides_when_flipped.details: Nav bar is hidden when card is flipped (via NavContext.setHideNav)

nav_bar_returns_when_unflipped.details: Nav bar returns to visible state when card is unflipped (via backdrop click or flip-back button)

other_cards_dimmed.details: 11 out of 12 cards have opacity 0.3 and pointer-events: none when one card is flipped

touch_scrolling.details: CSS touch-action rules set to pan-y allowing vertical scrolling. Programmatic scroll works. Full touch simulation requires real device.

no_css_errors.details: No CSS errors found in browser console

key_code_changes_verified.UnifiedPhotoCard.jsx: Flip state controlled by parent via flipped prop, no internal isFlipped state causing circular updates
key_code_changes_verified.MintedPhotos.jsx: flippedCardId controls flip state, backdrop onClick sets flippedCardId to null for smooth dismiss
